integration_validation_v2.evidence: content.rs:265-275 GUI verification group + :620-621 visual_debug_dom_snapshot (real tauri_command, CDP client exists operator_foreground/cdp_client.rs); model_manual_tests.rs:682-693 + :806-824 wires kernel_product_screenshot_capture_execute / visual_debugging_loop to registered actions (action_catalog.rs:2379,2430). Checklist is a manual/workflow row; proof is static, no managed-resource surface.

minimum_controls: Use contract-first identity and preserve projection hash.
risks: Imported MT contract may under-capture prose-only review or proof instructions.

acceptance_criteria: MT-159 [Model-Workflow-Diagnostics] GUI Verification Checklist -- Preserve UI verification checklist (readability
proof_targets: cargo test --test model_manual_tests -- asserts the GUI verification checklist rows (readability, discoverability, navigation coherence, no text overlap, responsive layout, important-state visibility, stable element IDs) are present in ModelManual content and bound to registered kernel actions (kernel_product_screenshot_capture_execute, visual_debugging_loop in action_catalog); static manual/workflow authority surface - no PostgreSQL/EventLedger runtime proof applicable
scope.risk_if_missed: CKC parity loss for GUI Verification Checklist
scope.summary: MT-159 [Model-Workflow-Diagnostics] GUI Verification Checklist -- Preserve UI verification checklist (readability, discoverability, navigation, no overlap, responsive, state visible, stable IDs).
